What changed?

## Why

## Layer check

- [ ] `pre-commit` impact understood
- [ ] `pre-push` impact understood
- [ ] `hosted` impact understood
- [ ] `nightly` impact understood
- [ ] `manual` impact understood, or this PR does not touch manual/live/provider/browser surfaces

## Truth check

- [ ] I did not turn `partial` into `supported now`
- [ ] I did not turn `package-ready` into `officially listed`
- [ ] If I changed outward wording, I synced the relevant docs
- [ ] If I changed live/provider/browser wording, I clearly marked workspace/manual boundaries

- commands run:
- exit codes:
- key evidence:

## Docs
